texto: We think of our species as swinging on the pinnacle of evolution, but this definitely isn’t the final design. If our bodies don’t evolve much further, our minds will. It’s the only way our species can save itself. An evolution of human consciousness is only a matter of time. And that’s when we will finally discover the good life, hand in hand. Meanwhile we just have to tough it out and make the most of things.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rupert Dreyfus sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “We think of our species as swinging on the pinnacle of evolution, but this definitely isn’t the f…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, philosophy-of-life, species, útil em momentos de reflexao.

It’s the only way our species can save itself. An evolution of human consciousness is only a matter of time. And that’s when we will finally discover the good life, hand in hand. texto: I know I’m not the patron saint of etiquette and me attitude stinks of arse, but at least I don’t dictate to nay cunt how they ought to spend their days. There are six billion of us on this rock. Why should we all like vanilla ice cream, wear supermarket denim and set our alarm clocks for the nine to five grind?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rupert Dreyfus: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios. O trecho “I know I’m not the patron saint of etiquette and me attitude stinks of arse, but at least I don’t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, capitalism, conformity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e conformity.

texto: The biggest act of rebellion right now is remaining defiantly hopeful.
explicacao: Citação de Rupert Dreyfus sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The biggest act of rebellion right now is remaining defiantly hopeful.” articula reflexao, esperanca, rebellion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como rebellion.
